creator: karlj000@unbc.ca
text:
At some time, Alexander said:
> As unified diff's for port updates, please.
> run diff -rNu /old/port /new/port 
> It's a REAL pain to update ports using shell archives.

I didn't actually get your message, and had to go looking through the
PR listing to find your response.  Sorry about the delay.

In any case, I made the diff as suggested, and I've attached it here.
I hope that's okay.  (I'm new here, please don't beat me.)

Thanks,

--

Jeremy

"In order to make an apple pie from scratch, you must first create the
universe."
		-- Carl Sagan, Cosmos
